CVE-2019-14318.title: Crypto++ 8.3.0 and earlier contains a timing side channel in ECDS ...
CVE-2019-14318.summary: Crypto++ 8.3.0 and earlier contains a timing side channel in ECDSA signature generation. This allows a local or remote attacker, able to measure the duration of hundreds to thousands of signing operations, to compute the private key used. The issue occurs because scalar multiplication in ecp.cpp (prime field curves, small leakage) and algebra.cpp (binary field curves, large leakage) is not constant time and leaks the bit length of the scalar among other information.

CVE-2021-40530.title: The ElGamal implementation in Crypto++ through 8.5 allows plainte ...
CVE-2021-40530.summary: The ElGamal implementation in Crypto++ through 8.5 allows plaintext recovery because, during interaction between two cryptographic libraries, a certain dangerous combination of the prime defined by the receiver's public key, the generator defined by the receiver's public key, and the sender's ephemeral exponents can lead to a cross-configuration attack against OpenPGP.

CVE-2022-48570.title: Crypto++ through 8.4 contains a timing side channel in ECDSA sign ...
CVE-2022-48570.summary: Crypto++ through 8.4 contains a timing side channel in ECDSA signature generation. Function FixedSizeAllocatorWithCleanup could write to memory outside of the allocation if the allocated memory was not 16-byte aligned. NOTE: this issue exists because the CVE-2019-14318 fix was intentionally removed for functionality reasons.

CVE-2023-50979.title: Crypto++ (aka cryptopp) through 8.9.0 has a Marvin side channel d ...
CVE-2023-50979.summary: Crypto++ (aka cryptopp) through 8.9.0 has a Marvin side channel during decryption with PKCS#1 v1.5 padding.

CVE-2023-50980.title: gf2n.cpp in Crypto++ (aka cryptopp) through 8.9.0 allows attacker ...
CVE-2023-50980.summary: gf2n.cpp in Crypto++ (aka cryptopp) through 8.9.0 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) via DER public-key data for an F(2^m) curve, if the degree of each term in the polynomial is not strictly decreasing.

CVE-2023-50981.title: ModularSquareRoot in Crypto++ (aka cryptopp) through 8.9.0 allows ...
CVE-2023-50981.summary: ModularSquareRoot in Crypto++ (aka cryptopp) through 8.9.0 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (infinite loop) via crafted DER public-key data associated with squared odd numbers, such as the square of 268995137513890432434389773128616504853.

CVE-2024-28285.title: A Fault Injection vulnerability in the SymmetricDecrypt function  ...
CVE-2024-28285.summary: A Fault Injection vulnerability in the SymmetricDecrypt function in cryptopp/elgamal.h of Cryptopp Crypto++ 8.9, allows an attacker to co-reside in the same system with a victim process to disclose information and escalate privileges.
